scripts.watchdog:sidecar: bash -lc 'cd src-tauri && TARGET="$(rustc -vV | awk "/host:/ {print \$2}")" && cargo build --release --bin clickshield_watchdog && mkdir -p binaries && cp target/release/clickshield_watchdog binaries/clickshield_watchdog-${TARGET} && chmod +x binaries/clickshield_watchdog-${TARGET} && ls -la binaries | sed -n "1,120p"'
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run watchdog:sidecar && npx tauri dev
